properties.name: Efficacy: Weight of Mountain
properties.description: Against Vulnerable enemies, the wielder gains DMG Dealt +{dmg_up:0.0%}. When the wielder's battle skill applies Vulnerability, the wielder gains All Attributes +{all_attr_up:0.0%} for {duration:0}s. When the wielder's battle skill applies Physical Susceptibility, the wielder gains All Attributes +{all_attr_up2:0.0%} for {duration:0}s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.
